design_philosophy: A premium, cinematic dark mode EV marketplace that seamlessly transitions into a high-density, performance-driven data dashboard for referrals and commissions. We emphasize deep navy backgrounds with electric blue and subtle green kinetic triggers.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Overlines and tags must be uppercase with wide tracking.

general.padding: Generous - p-8, p-12, p-16 for marketing sections; compact (p-4, p-6) for dashboard grids.
general.radius: rounded-2xl for large cards, rounded-lg for internal components, sharp edges for technical charts.

marketing_pages.grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
marketing_pages.hero_overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#070B14]/80 via-[#070B14]/40 to-transparent for text readability.

dashboard_pages.grid: Control Room Grid Mode B - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4.
dashboard_pages.cards: Flat background (surface color), 1px subtle border, no heavy shadows. Use subgrid where possible.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#070B14]/70 border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat Solid: bg-[#0C1222] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/15 transition-colors.
surface_strategies.binary_tree_nodes: Neumorphism/Glass tile hybrid. bg-[#0C1222] border-white/20, active branches glow with border-[#00E5FF]/60 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)].

binary_tree_visualization.implementation: Use SVG lines for edges. Nodes should be flex containers. Edges glow blue (LEFT) or green (RIGHT) when active.
binary_tree_visualization.zoom_pan: Implement mouse/touch drag to pan, wheel to zoom.
binary_tree_visualization.node_details: Show user initials, rank, and total matched pairs on hover.

component_guidelines.marketing: Use raw HTML + Tailwind CSS. Avoid Shadcn for landing page layout.
component_guidelines.forms_and_dashboard: Heavily customize Shadcn components (Tables, Inputs, Dialogs, Select).
component_guidelines.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Apply dark theme gridlines (stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) and electric blue/green lines.
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

motion_and_interaction.loading: Subtle skeleton loaders using animate-pulse with surface color.

hero_scooter.description: Modern EV scooter in studio lighting with dark background, perfect for the main product showcase.

lifestyle_scooter.description: Person riding a scooter down a neon-lit street at night, capturing the electric, premium lifestyle vibe.

secondary_scooter.description: Scooter parked by building, used for feature section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn components.
Implement the landing page with raw HTML/Tailwind for a bespoke feel, using the provided image URLs.
For the dashboards (admin and customer), strictly use the Control Room Grid and flat surface strategies.
The binary tree visualization should be interactive with panning and zooming.
Ensure the navbar and login screens feature the 'Dream Pick' text logo with Outfit font.
Use Electric Blue (#00E5FF) for primary CTAs and Subtle Green (#00FFA3) for success/growth indicators.
Enforce dark navy (#070B14) as the global background.
Apply data-testid to every interactive element.
